{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315411549E24672DE46E19FF618"}"},"total":843},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7585523395860398872","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不藏实力的设定太香了！没有磨磨唧唧的伪装，姜宁从城门下马威到侯府杀供奉，露头就秒的快感直接拉满，搭配无系统纯靠天赋的设定，爽感翻倍！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766145661,"group_id":"7501744146617486398","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"冬的温暖，已经不想在体验夏的寒凉","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1DJ22bVaMUQpU3xT04YqH5tQuk4QoL0iH4UKU1scuLD","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/81ee9b7c8ac54705810a7381814432ac~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790703&x-signature=6N7I3NsNCuSlmQ511eQ9wdqS4xY%3D","user_id":"3767390284556135","user_name":"温情小雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3767390284556135","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7501744146617486398","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌+不隐藏实力+无系统+九子夺嫡+横推+零帧起手+露头就秒+概念神】
姜宁穿越成为大夏王朝九皇子，并且拥有逆天的天赋。江湖游历十年归来，已是举世无敌之资。
在姜宁绝对的伟力面前，任何阴谋诡计弹指可破。
玄武门夺嫡，一举镇压所有的竞争者，已绝对的优势入主东宫。
面对内忧外患的王朝遗留七百余年的难题，姜宁轻松破解。
面对异族的攻伐，姜宁随手镇杀。
夏帝姜宁曾以为自己天下无敌，可自从天上来敌之后，他才发现自己天上也无敌。
本书又名《江湖游历十年，开局万古第一仙》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/03c173eff8849ea1a3a7b42822078954","author":"腰德尔人","author_id":"","book_id":"7501744146617486398","book_name":"九子夺嫡？我已成万古第一仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":868,"name":"剑修","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=868&name=剑修&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7501744229723423294","read_count":"34352","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1001266"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"480","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,无敌,架空,剑修","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fcfe5a5ba988fedd195f5d23a7a67aac~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435675&x-signature=53ZyD0sPqqFAsRKNyBdAZfPBM7g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"58146586285","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"21"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315411549E24672DE46E19FF618"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration n":8953,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20495,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4312},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1760456419,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602002117280645912","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"环境描写烘托气氛，人物出场自带气场，九皇子姜宁淡然无视下马威的情节，直接将主角的逼格拉满。
身世背景交代得简洁明了，十年游历的伏笔、家族内斗的矛盾、皇位之争的暗流，层层铺垫引人入胜。
武道大宗师的表哥与归来的皇子形成鲜明对比，冲突感十足，文笔流畅，叙事节奏恰到好处，让人迫不及待想知道主角归来后的布局，五星推荐！","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":18,"text":"九皇子","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B9%9D%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774251675E19FF618%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227602002117280645912%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227501744146617486398%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B9%9D%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769989630,"group_id":"7501744146617486398","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N521iRyQ34sIupTSRgQq0OM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"52857102875","user_name":"爱吃炒粿条的刘海康"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"52857102875","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7501744146617486398","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌+不隐藏实力+无系统+九子夺嫡+横推+零帧起手+露头就秒+概念神】
